​Mesafeleri Aşan Bir Klasik: Sevginin Bağladıkları (Sleepless in Seattle)

​Sinema tarihinin en ikonik çiftlerinden Tom Hanks ve Meg Ryan’ı bir araya getiren Sleepless in Seattle, üzerinden yıllar geçse de kalbimizdeki yerini koruyan, mucizelere ve kadere olan inancımızı tazeleyen bir başyapıt. 

​Karısını kaybettikten sonra derin bir yas tutan Sam’in hikayesi, küçük oğlunun bir radyo kanalına bağlanıp babası için yeni bir eş dilemesiyle bambaşka bir boyuta taşınır. Kıta ötesinde bu sesi duyan Annie (Meg Ryan) ise kendi düzenli hayatını ve nişanlısını sorgulamaya başlar. Film; sevginin sadece fiziksel bir yakınlık değil, ruhların birbirini en imkansız anlarda bile bulabileceği o "sihirli" çekim gücü olduğunu anlatır. 

​
​İkonik Kimya: Tom Hanks ve Meg Ryan ikilisinin, filmin neredeyse tamamında yan yana gelmemelerine rağmen seyirciye geçirdikleri o muazzam çekim gücü sinema tarihinde çok nadirdir. 

​Umut Veren Melankoli: Yas tutmanın ağırlığı ile yeni bir başlangıç yapmanın heyecanını muazzam bir dengede tutar. 

​Efsanevi Final: Empire State binasının tepesinde, o kırmızı kalp ışığının altında gerçekleşen final sahnesi, sinema tarihinin en romantik anlarından biri olarak kabul edilir. 

​Kader Teması: "Yaşanan hiçbir şey tesadüf değildir" fikrini, izleyicinin ruhunu dinlendiren bir atmosferle işler. 

​Peki ya siz? Birbirini hiç görmemiş iki insanın sadece bir sesle veya bir hisle birbirine bağlanabileceğine inanıyor musunuz? Sizi de Annie gibi "acaba mı?" dedirten o kader anlarına götüren film hangisi? Yorumlarda bu mucizevi hikayeyi konuşalım. 👇

​Sinemanın kalbe dokunan en özel hikayelerini ve unutulmaz çiftlerini birlikte keşfetmek için sayfamı takip etmeyi unutmayın!

Movie: The Terminal (2004)

A warm, deeply human, and quietly powerful story that reminds us how hope can survive even in the most unexpected places — The Terminal follows Viktor Navorski, a man stranded in JFK Airport after his home country collapses overnight, leaving him without a valid passport and nowhere to go. What begins as a bureaucratic nightmare slowly transforms into a beautiful journey of resilience, kindness, and the small moments that make life meaningful.

Tom Hanks delivers one of his most heartfelt performances, bringing Viktor to life with innocence, humor, and unbreakable optimism. As he learns to navigate the strange world inside the airport, he forms unlikely friendships, finds purpose in the chaos, and proves that humanity can shine brightest when everything else falls apart. Catherine Zeta-Jones adds warmth and complexity, creating a delicate dynamic that makes the story even more touching.

What makes The Terminal unforgettable is its soul — its belief in compassion, in connection, and in the idea that every person carries a story worth listening to. It’s gentle, emotional, and quietly inspiring, turning an ordinary setting into a place of extraordinary transformation.

⭐ IMDb Rating: 7.4/10
⭐ My Rating: 8.6/10

Unconditional Love — The Heartfelt Story of Forrest and Jenny ❤️

Forrest Gump is a 1994 American drama film directed by Robert Zemeckis and starring Tom Hanks. The movie tells the inspiring life story of Forrest, a kind-hearted man with a low IQ but a pure soul. Despite his limitations, Forrest unwittingly influences several historical events while pursuing love, friendship, and purpose. His famous line, “Life is like a box of chocolates, you never know what you’re gonna get,” captures the film’s central theme — the unpredictability of life. Through his innocence, courage, and determination, Forrest teaches that success and happiness come from perseverance and staying true to oneself.

Abhishek Sharma is a left-handed top-order batter and part-time left-arm orthodox spinner from Punjab, India. Born on 4 September 2000 in Amritsar, he came through India’s strong domestic pipeline and first caught attention during youth cricket.

Early breakthrough

He was part of India’s squad in the 2018 ICC Under-19 World Cup, which India won. That tournament didn’t make him a global superstar overnight—but it put him on the radar as a serious white-ball talent.

IPL career

Started with Delhi Daredevils (now Delhi Capitals).

Moved to Sunrisers Hyderabad (SRH), where he truly developed.

Known for aggressive powerplay hitting.

Often used as an opener in T20s.

His growth in the IPL has been about role clarity. Early on, he was inconsistent—big shots but no stability. Over time, especially with SRH, he evolved into a more fearless power hitter who can dismantle bowlers in the first six overs.

Playing style

Batting: Explosive, attacks from ball one, strong against spin.

Bowling: Useful left-arm spin option, but batting is his primary value.

Strength: Intent.

Weakness: Shot selection under pressure—when he fails, it’s often because he forces the game.

Why he matters

India has no shortage of technically correct batters. What it always hunts for in T20 cricket is controlled aggression. Abhishek fits that profile. If he improves temperament and consistency, he can be more than just an IPL hitter.
2026年1月10日 台湾的教育体系一直以华语主导,导致会讲台语的人口越来越少。

随着第一家公立“台语实验小学”挂牌,外界都关注,这能否为老化的本土语言带来转机?37岁的高雄人黄子维,从小在台语家庭环境长大,如今当了爸爸,他也积极为女儿营造台语环境,要求家中长辈一定要跟小孩讲台语。“还没有小孩之前,我们就决定要跟孩子讲台语。那时候的想法很单纯,想说我会的东西,让我的孩子多学一样也不错。”如今女儿幸飞已经6岁,能讲一口流利的台语,日常生活中去市场、餐厅,她都能和大人聊上几句。但真正的挑战在于学校,台湾的教育体制以华语主导,一般小孩上学后都不再讲母语。幸飞去年准备升读小学,就在黄子维为女儿苦恼之际,恰巧高雄出现了全台湾首家“台语实验小学”北岭国小,让学童能首度在体制内,用台语为主、华语为辅接受教育。该校是从传统学校转型过来,距离黄子维一家所住的桥头区并不近,但和太太讨论后,夫妻俩决定每天花来回各半小时以上车程,接送女儿去

caption:
Bruh literally 😭💔

​Abhishek Sharma has truly fallen victim to the worst kind of nazar after Mohammad Amir’s disrespectful comments and it is actually heartbreaking to witness this downfall. Seeing a talent like him struggle with three consecutive ducks in the T20 World Cup is a nightmare that no fan ever prepared for today. The weight of those three zeros is feeling heavier than anything else right now because the expectations were sky-high for this opening slot. It feels like the evil eye is working overtime to ensure he doesn't even get off the mark while the critics are having a field day. I am literally sitting here in shock because witnessing a hat-trick of ducks on the biggest stage of cricket is pure agony for anyone who supports India. Mohammad Amir's insult seems to have triggered a curse that just won't break no matter how hard he tries to find the gap. We were all waiting for those massive sixes but instead we are left with the silence of the stadium and another walk back to the pavilion. This is the most brutal phase a young player can go through and honestly my heart is just breaking for the kid right now. I really hope he finds the strength to shut everyone up in the next game because this consecutive duck streak is becoming too much to handle. This level of sadness is unmatched and the nazar is definitely real because how else can you explain this series of unfortunate events on the field.

caption:
In Burn After Reading (2008), Brad Pitt’s Chad Feldheimer is pure goofy confidence—smiling, clueless, and completely unaware of the danger he’s in. Then, without warning, his story ends in the most abrupt and absurd way imaginable. No buildup, no heroic beat—just instant Coen Brothers chaos. The brilliance is how casually it happens, snapping the film from comedy to pitch-black humor in seconds. Pitt later said it’s one of his favorite moments he’s ever done, precisely because it’s so unexpected and so bizarrely funny. A perfect snapshot of the Coens’ world, where humor, confusion, and consequences collide out of nowhere.
#BurnAfterReading #BradPitt #CoenBrothers
#MovieMoments #DarkComedy

Meet Mr. Nikhil Nanda, the chairman of Escorts Kubota. He is married to Shwetha Bachchan the daughter of film star Amitabh Bachchan. Escorts  was founded in 1944 by this grandfather Har Prasad Nanda. By 1960s, Escorts was among the first to manufacture tractors in India, by partnering with companies like Ford. Nikhil Nanda joined the business in 1990s and in 2018 he took over as Chairman after his father Rajan Nanda's passing. Under his leadership, Escorts partnered with Japanese Kubota corporation.  Today company is worth over Rs48,000 crore, producing tractors, agri machinery, railway equipment and construction machine.

It feels almost unreal to announce that Abhishek Bachchan is coming to IFP 15! 🎉

A powerhouse performer with iconic roles in Guru, Yuva, Sarkar, Dhoom, Bunty Aur Babli and many more, he’s an actor who has constantly reinvented himself with depth, charm, and versatility. 

From intense drama to effortless comedy, he’s delivered some of Indian cinema’s most memorable characters.

We’re beyond thrilled to welcome him to the IFP stage this year!

Are YOU coming?! Let us know in the comments below!
